title: Printing Press
details: Johannes Gutenberg develops the movable type printing press.

title: Columbus Reaches the Americas
details: Christopher Columbus lands in the Americas.

title: Newton's Principia
details: Isaac Newton publishes Philosophiae Naturalis Principia Mathematica.

title: Watt Steam Engine
details: James Watt patents improvements to the steam engine.

title: US Declaration of Independence
details: The thirteen colonies declare independence.

title: French Revolution Begins
details: Storming of the Bastille marks the start of the French Revolution.

title: First Smallpox Vaccine
details: Edward Jenner develops the smallpox vaccine.

title: Telephone Patent
details: Alexander Graham Bell patents the telephone.

title: Practical Light Bulb
details: Thomas Edison demonstrates a practical incandescent light bulb.

title: First Powered Flight
details: The Wright brothers achieve powered flight.

title: World War I Begins
details: Outbreak of World War I in Europe.

title: Penicillin Discovered
details: Alexander Fleming discovers penicillin.

title: World War II Begins
details: Germany invades Poland.

title: ENIAC Completed
details: ENIAC, an early general-purpose computer, is completed.

title: DNA Double Helix Described
details: Watson and Crick publish the DNA double helix model.

title: Sputnik 1 Launch
details: The first artificial Earth satellite is launched.

title: Apollo 11 Moon Landing
details: Humans land on the Moon.

title: ARPANET Goes Live
details: ARPANET sends its first message.

title: First Commercial Microprocessor
details: Intel releases the 4004 microprocessor.

title: World Wide Web Proposed
details: Tim Berners-Lee proposes the World Wide Web.

title: Hubble Space Telescope Launch
details: NASA launches the Hubble Space Telescope.

title: Human Genome Draft
details: First draft of the human genome is announced.

title: Wikipedia Launches
details: Wikipedia goes online.

title: Facebook Launches
details: Facebook is launched.

title: First iPhone Released
details: Apple releases the first iPhone.

title: Higgs Boson Discovery Announced
details: CERN announces discovery of a Higgs-like boson.

title: Gravitational Waves Confirmed
details: LIGO confirms detection of gravitational waves.

title: First Black Hole Image
details: Event Horizon Telescope captures first black hole image.

title: James Webb Space Telescope Launch
details: JWST launches to space.

title: ChatGPT Public Release
details: ChatGPT is released to the public.
